mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) indicate robust labor market conditions, which signal corporate earnings resilience and drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k monthly growth.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating GDP growth (GDPC1) reflects strong aggregate demand, which boosts corporate profits and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline by 2%+ in 50%+ of quarters with GDPC1 growth above 3% annualized.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of low inflation (CPIAUCSL < 310) and low policy rates (FEDFUNDS < 4.5%) signals accommodative monetary conditions that support equity valuations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where both CPIAUCSL < 310 and FEDFUNDS < 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in unemployment (UNRATE < 4.5%) during a recession recovery phase signals improving labor market conditions, which drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline by 1.5%+ in 50%+ of instances where UNRATE < 4.5% and RSAFS > 700k.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO > 102.5) indicates strong manufacturing activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 102.5.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST > 1300) reflects strong demand for residential construction, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline by 0.5%+ in 50%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 1300.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising consumer spending (RSAFS > 710k) and declining unemployment (UNRATE < 4.5%) signals strong household demand, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where RSAFS > 710k and UNRATE < 4.5%.
